settings.heading: Price Match
settings.tab_content: We check our prices every day to ensure we can bring you the best price possible. In the unlikely case that you have found a cheaper price then please contact us on support@example.com and we'll do our best to answer your query right away!

settings.heading: Delivery Information
settings.tab_content:
The standard delivery from Monday to Friday is FREE
The express delivery from Monday to Friday is £14.99
The saturday delivery is £29.99
The sunday delivery is £34.99

settings.heading: Flexible Delivery
settings.tab_content:
We know that you expect your goods to be delivered promptly and efficiently. That’s why we have made it a priority at electricshop.com to deliver your goods as quickly as possible using our fast, efficient delivery service which comes direct to your home and is FREE for most items!

- We deliver seven days a week 
- Standard deliveries are despatched via specialist carriers and are normally delivered within 3-5 working days. 
- Express deliveries are dispatched same day (if ordered before 14:30) for delivery within 1-2 working days.
- For weekend deliveries, orders need to be placed by 14:30 on Friday.
- Larger Items are despatched using our team of specialist nationwide carriers. You will be contacted within 48 hours verifying your order and an estimated delivery date.
- Deliveries direct from manufacturers or suppliers can take a little longer but we will keep you informed and updated.

settings.heading: About this item
settings.text:
• NOTE: If headset is too tight we suggest placing them over a ball or something of similar size/shape. Leave undisturbed for at least 24 hours. Repeat if necessary. Please also try length adjustments of either earpiece until both sides best fit you.
  • JBL PURE BASS SOUND: These wirelss headpones feature the renowned JBL Pure Bass sound, which can be found in the most famous venues all around the world.
  • WIRELESS BLUETOOTH: These headphones stream wirelessly from your device and can even switch between two devices so that you don't miss a call.
  • UP TO 40 HOURS BATTERY WITH SPEED CHARGE: For long-lasting fun, listen wirelessly for up to 40 hours and recharge the battery in as little as 2 hours with the convenient Type-C USB cable. A quick 5-minute recharge gives you 2 additional hours of music.
  • MICROPHONE ON EAR CUP FOR HANDS-FREE CALLS: Easily control your sound and manage your calls from your headphones with the convenient buttons on the ear-cup.
  • ASK SIRI OR HEY GOOGLE: Siri or Hey Google is just a button away: activate the voice assistant of your device by pushing the multi-function button.
  • Featuring an adjustable headband the Tune 510BT are designed to fit nearly any head size comfortably
  • Housing: Closed
  • Folding / Swivel
  • Driver: Dynamic / 40.0 mm
  • Frequency response: 8 Hz - 40 kHz
  • Line Input:3.5 mm stereo mini (Power ON: ANC / HT Enable) (Power OFF: Driver Direct)
  • Hi-Res: Wired connection only
  • Line Input Position: Single-sided
  • Weight: 330 g
  • Bluetooth® Version: Bluetooth® V5.0
  • Supported Profiles: A2DP, AVRCP, HFP, HSP
  • Supported Codecs: SBC, AAC, Qualcomm® aptX™ Adaptive
  • Maximum Communication Range: 10m (without interference)
  • Charging Time: Approx. 3.5 h
  • Continuous playback time: Approx. 34h (Advanced ANC=ON, 3D Sound Filed=OFF), Approx. 11h (Advanced ANC=ON, 3D Sound Field=ON)
  • Listening Care (Advanced)
  • Ambient Sound
  • Active Noise Cancelling
  • Listening Optimizer
  • 3D Sound Field
  • Voice Assistance (Siri® / Google Asisstant)
  • App (Headphones Controller)

settings.heading: NCUK Dessert Maker – Black
settings.text:
Create indulgent homemade frozen desserts at the touch of a button with the Ninja NC300UK Ice Cream & Dessert Maker. Designed with Ninja’s innovative Creamify Technology, this clever machine transforms your frozen bases into luxuriously smooth ice cream, silky gelato, refreshing sorbets, thick milkshakes and more – all in minutes.

Whether you’re looking for a healthier alternative or a truly decadent treat, the CREAMi gives you complete control. Choose from indulgent flavours, low-sugar options, dairy-free, vegan or even keto-friendly recipes. The included 2 x 493ml Dessert Tubs with lids mean you can prepare, freeze and enjoy different flavours whenever you like.

7 One-Touch Programs

With 7 pre-set functions – Ice Cream, Gelato, Sorbet, Smoothie Bowl, Light Ice Cream, Milkshake and Mix-Ins – your favourite desserts and drinks are just a button away. Each program uses an intelligent combination of speed and time to deliver the perfect texture, from light and airy to rich and creamy.

Endless Customisation

Add your own twist with the Mix-Ins program, blending extras like chocolate chips, nuts, biscuits or fruit evenly throughout your dessert. You can even upgrade shop-bought ice cream by adding your favourite toppings for a personalised finish.

Simple, Convenient & Stylish

Using the Ninja CREAMi is effortless – simply fill a tub with your chosen ingredients, freeze for 24 hours, then let the Creamerizer paddle work its magic. A handy display screen with a progress bar keeps you updated while your dessert is being prepared. When you’re done, the tubs, lids and paddle are all dishwasher safe, making cleanup quick and easy.

Key Features
  • Ninja’s original Ice Cream & Frozen Dessert Maker
  • Creamify Technology for smooth, creamy results every time
  • 2 x 493ml Dessert Tubs with lids included
  • 7 one-touch programs for versatile frozen treats
  • Dimensions: H 40.5cm x W 16.5cm x D 27cm
  • Weight: 6.4kg
  • Sleek Black/Silver finish
  • 2-year guarantee upon registration with Ninja (UK & ROI only)
Make It Your Way

From spoon-thick smoothie bowls in the morning to refreshing sorbets on a summer’s day, indulgent evening ice creams or milkshakes for the kids, the Ninja NC300UK ensures everyone in the family gets their favourite flavour.

settings.heading: Tune 510 BT
settings.text: The Tune 510BT headphones let you stream powerful Pure Bass sound with no strings attached. Easy to use, with up to 40 hours of battery life and speed charge, they are super lightweight and comfortable. Grab them and fill your day with music!

settings.heading: Listen for Longer.
settings.text:
Up to 40H battery life and speed charge (5mins = 2H)
For long-lasting fun, listen wirelessly for 40 hours and recharge the battery in as little as 2 hours with the convenient Type-C USB cable. A quick 5-minute recharge gives you 2 additional hours of music.

settings.heading: Pure Bass Sound
settings.text: These wireless headphones feature the renowned Pure Bass sound, which can be found in the most famous venues all around the world. Wirelessly stream this high-quality sound from your smartphone without messy cords

settings.heading: Does it come with a charger?
settings.row_content: No ..they give nothing… no wired air buds either.. way more money too

settings.heading: Will this have a sim tray?
settings.row_content: This model does not have a SIM tray. If you want a SIM tray iPhone I would suggest getting iPhone 13 models and earlier also have a SIM tray for a nano-SIM card—you can use a nano-SIM card from a carrier. iPhone 13 models support Dual eSIM. You can set up a cellular data plan with an eSIM with certain iPad models. According to Apple. Read more about Apple SIM cards at their website.

settings.heading: What does unlocked mean in terms of a phone?
settings.row_content: Unlocked to any carrier like Verizon, Cricket, Boost Mobile etc.

settings.heading: Whats the battery life
settings.row_content: If you are a doom scroller, 1 day, I use mine as my primary work phone, casual doom scroller in my down time- especially since September 10th RIP CK. If you are using it as per normal, I often get 2 full work days between charges.

settings.heading: Can I connect t to boost, mobile?
settings.row_content: Yes you can only because this is a unlocked phone . i would also recommend you check with boost as well.
